name: horizon-blocks
description: Modern WordPress block theme with componentized template parts and editable patterns.

scripts.build:static: powershell -NoProfile -Command "if (-not (Test-Path 'resources/static')) { exit 0 }; foreach ($dir in @('assets/images','assets/models','assets/fonts','assets/media')) { if (Test-Path $dir) { Remove-Item $dir -Recurse -Force } }; $sourceRoot = (Resolve-Path 'resources/static').Path; Get-ChildItem 'resources/static' -Recurse -Force | Where-Object { -not $_.PSIsContainer -and $_.Name -ne '.gitkeep' } | ForEach-Object { $relative = $_.FullName.Substring($sourceRoot.Length).TrimStart('\\'); $destination = Join-Path (Join-Path (Get-Location) 'assets') $relative; $destinationDir = Split-Path $destination -Parent; if (-not (Test-Path $destinationDir)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $destinationDir -Force | Out-Null }; Copy-Item $_.FullName -Destination $destination -Force }"
scripts.package:zip: powershell -NoProfile -Command "if (Test-Path dist) { Remove-Item dist -Recurse -Force }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path dist | Out-Null; Compress-Archive -Path assets,inc,parts,patterns,templates,functions.php,README.md,style.css,theme.json -DestinationPath dist/horizon-blocks.zip -Force"
